ProjectTemplate.Title: LabVIEW Real-Time Control (NI-DAQmx)
ProjectTemplate.Description: Implements deterministic, software-based control of a plant. This sample project uses NI-DAQmx.

ProjectTemplate.Title: LabVIEW Real-Time Waveform Acquisition and Logging (NI-DAQmx)
ProjectTemplate.Description: Acquires continuous waveform data and logs it to disk. This sample project uses NI-DAQmx.
ProjectTemplate.ProjectPath: LabVIEW Real-Time Waveform Acquisition and Logging (NI-DAQmx).lvproj
ProjectTemplate.DocumentationPath: documentation/LabVIEW Real-Time Waveform Acquisition and Logging (NI-DAQmx) Documentation.html
